languages.text: "Прошу прощения, Лорд-капитан! Мы с генетором Ферренцом постараемся больше вас не тревожить". {n}Мартинакс кланяется вам до самого пола, Ферренц следует его примеру, опуская корпус настолько низко, насколько позволяют механодендриты за его спиной.{/n}

"I apologise, Lord Captain! Genetor Ferrenz and I will endeavour not to trouble you again." {n}Martinax bows deeply before you, doubling over until he touches the floor, and Ferrenz follows suit, pitching his body as low as the mechadendrites at his back will allow.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Прошу прощения, Лорд-капитан! Мы с генетором Ферренцом постараемся больше вас не тревожить". {n}Мартинакс кланяется вам до самого пола, Ферренц следует его примеру, опуская корпус настолько низко, насколько позволяют механодендриты за его спиной.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "I apologise, Lord Captain! Genetor Ferrenz and I will endeavour not to trouble you again." {n}Martinax bows deeply before you, doubling over until he touches the floor, and Ferrenz follows suit, pitching his body as low as the mechadendrites at his back will allow.{/n}

"I apologise, Lord Captain! Genetor Ferrenz and I will endeavour not to trouble you again." {n}Martinax bows deeply before you, doubling over until he touches the floor, and Ferrenz follows suit, pitching his body as low as the mechadendrites at his back will allow.{/n}

"I apologise, Lord Captain! Genetor Ferrenz and I will endeavour not to trouble you again." {n}Martinax bows deeply before you, doubling over until he touches the floor, and Ferrenz follows suit, pitching his body as low as the mechadendrites at his back will allow.{/n}

languages.text: «¡Lo lamento, Lord Capitán! El genetor Ferrenz y yo nos esforzaremos por no volver a importunarle». {n}Martinax te hace una profunda reverencia, doblándose hasta tocar el suelo, y Ferrenz sigue su ejemplo, inclinando su cuerpo tanto como lo permiten las mecadendritas de su espalda.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I apologise, Lord Captain! Genetor Ferrenz and I will endeavour not to trouble you again." {n}Martinax bows deeply before you, doubling over until he touches the floor, and Ferrenz follows suit, pitching his body as low as the mechadendrites at his back will allow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡Lo lamento, Lord Capitán! El genetor Ferrenz y yo nos esforzaremos por no volver a importunarle». {n}Martinax te hace una profunda reverencia, doblándose hasta tocar el suelo, y Ferrenz sigue su ejemplo, inclinando su cuerpo tanto como lo permiten las mecadendritas de su espalda.{/n}

languages.text: “万分抱歉，舰长大人！基因士费伦茨与我定当竭力不再对您造成困扰。”{n}马丁纳克斯朝你深深鞠躬，腰身几乎对折，直到额头触及地面；费伦茨也随之俯身，极力压低身躯，直到背上的机械触须再不容他弯下分毫。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I apologise, Lord Captain! Genetor Ferrenz and I will endeavour not to trouble you again." {n}Martinax bows deeply before you, doubling over until he touches the floor, and Ferrenz follows suit, pitching his body as low as the mechadendrites at his back will allow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “万分抱歉，舰长大人！基因士费伦茨与我定当竭力不再对您造成困扰。”{n}马丁纳克斯朝你深深鞠躬，腰身几乎对折，直到额头触及地面；费伦茨也随之俯身，极力压低身躯，直到背上的机械触须再不容他弯下分毫。{/n}

languages.text: « Veuillez m'excuser, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! Le genetor Ferrenz et moi-même tâcherons de ne plus vous troubler. » {n}Martinax s'incline profondément devant vous, se penchant jusqu’à toucher le sol, et Ferrenz l’imite, pliant son corps autant que ses mécadendrites l’y autorisent.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I apologise, Lord Captain! Genetor Ferrenz and I will endeavour not to trouble you again." {n}Martinax bows deeply before you, doubling over until he touches the floor, and Ferrenz follows suit, pitching his body as low as the mechadendrites at his back will allow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Veuillez m'excuser, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! Le genetor Ferrenz et moi-même tâcherons de ne plus vous troubler. » {n}Martinax s'incline profondément devant vous, se penchant jusqu’à toucher le sol, et Ferrenz l’imite, pliant son corps autant que ses mécadendrites l’y autorisent.{/n}

languages.text: "Özür dilerim Lord Kaptan! Genetör Ferrenz ve ben sizi bir daha rahatsız etmemeye gayret edeceğiz." {n}Martinax, önünde yere değecek kadar iki büklüm eğiliyor. Ferrenz de sırtındaki mekadentritlerin izin verdiği ölçüde vücudunu alçaltarak onu takip ediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I apologise, Lord Captain! Genetor Ferrenz and I will endeavour not to trouble you again." {n}Martinax bows deeply before you, doubling over until he touches the floor, and Ferrenz follows suit, pitching his body as low as the mechadendrites at his back will allow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Özür dilerim Lord Kaptan! Genetör Ferrenz ve ben sizi bir daha rahatsız etmemeye gayret edeceğiz." {n}Martinax, önünde yere değecek kadar iki büklüm eğiliyor. Ferrenz de sırtındaki mekadentritlerin izin verdiği ölçüde vücudunu alçaltarak onu takip ediyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Es tut mir leid, Lord Captain. Genetor Ferrenz und ich werden Euch nicht mehr belästigen." {n}Martinax macht eine tiefe Verbeugung, bis er den Boden berührt, und Ferrenz folgt seinem Beispiel, indem er sich so tief verneigt, wie es die Mechadendriten an seinem Rücken zulassen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I apologise, Lord Captain! Genetor Ferrenz and I will endeavour not to trouble you again." {n}Martinax bows deeply before you, doubling over until he touches the floor, and Ferrenz follows suit, pitching his body as low as the mechadendrites at his back will allow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Es tut mir leid, Lord Captain. Genetor Ferrenz und ich werden Euch nicht mehr belästigen." {n}Martinax macht eine tiefe Verbeugung, bis er den Boden berührt, und Ferrenz folgt seinem Beispiel, indem er sich so tief verneigt, wie es die Mechadendriten an seinem Rücken zulassen.{/n}

languages.text: 「申し訳ございません、艦長様！私はジェネトール・フェレンツと、二度とご迷惑をおかけしないよう努めます。」{n}マーティナックスは深く頭を下げ、床に頭をつけた。フェレンツもまた、背中の機械腕が許す限り体を低く垂れた。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I apologise, Lord Captain! Genetor Ferrenz and I will endeavour not to trouble you again." {n}Martinax bows deeply before you, doubling over until he touches the floor, and Ferrenz follows suit, pitching his body as low as the mechadendrites at his back will allow.{/n}
